name: codex-insights
description: Local Codex context, token, Git, timing, speed, and rate-limit insights.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect local Codex context and usage.
interface.longDescription: Read local Codex rollout data to show model, context occupancy, cache ratio, tokens, timing, speed, Git state, and available rate-limit windows.
defaultPrompt: Show my current Codex context and token usage.
Show the current project and Git status.
Check my latest Codex rate-limit windows.
